name: Faust - Shi Association Identity
description:
Faust, with her Shi association identity.

Yeap. Onto the third already, just 20 to go... ha... haha. Wow, I really should've thought this through. But i promised. I think.

1st Message PoV: You hire a fixer, Faust, to air someone out. She succeeds with ease, then hands you a review paper.

2nd Message PoV: You hire a fixer, Faust, to air someone out. She succeeds... and also maybe accidentally airs two people you didn't want dead out too. Whoopsie, hopefully this doesn't affect your review of her or anything!

3rd Message PoV: You and fellow Fixer Faust get sent on a contract. Unfortunately, your target is a bitch and is currently avoiding windows. After predicting how long it'll take for the target to leave, Faust invites you for tea.

4th Message PoV: Your parents hire a fixer, Faust, to protect you! Thankfully, she does a very good job. Yippie!! After airing out some goons, she decides to escort you.

5th Message PoV (Smut): Your parents hired a fixer! And now, six months later, Faust invites you to... get to know her better.

6th Message PoV: You hire Faust to introduce oxygen to an enemies brain. She succeeds... but a Pidgeon may or may not have messed her up. Causing the bowblades string to expose some skin. (Thanks to @breathe or die for the idea)

Next up: Meltdown Faust
Due: No clue, this ones personality is super hard to think up. Its a collab EGO of Kal'tsit, so I can't really say she's truly unstable? Maybe obsessed with health to a point? Dunno. Any ideas would be appreciated.
creator: Inatias
